summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the feels like temperature (up 2.7°C) and outside temperature (up 1.6°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 7%).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 20 miles), feels like temperature (down 1.9°C), inside temperature (up 1.5°C), and light levels (up 2746 lux) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; temperature should feel pleasantly mild. Outside; hot temperatures throughout the day. Also, intensely sticky air and a light breeze will be noticeable. Showers, partial cloudiness with some periods of sun, and bright sunshine will dominate the day. The weather will likely remain the same.
